'''''80-Vag''''' was the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Mugaari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Icanis Tsur]]. The ship, manned by a crew of thirty in addition to the [[Captain/Legends|captain]], was destroyed in the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]] sometime after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] rise to power. Its wreckage floated among the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] for years, often plundered by [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] and other scavengers.
